creator: b.shertenlieb@yahoo.com
text:
multimedia/plexmediaserver-plexpass: Update to 1.32.0.6865

 * New release from Plex.tv

  Changelog:

   https://forums.plex.tv/t/plex-media-server/30447/569

    NEW:
     (Windows) The minimum supported Windows client operating
      system is now Windows 10 Version 1607
     (Windows) The minimum supported Windows server operating
      system is now Windows Server 2016
     (macOS) The minimum supported version is now macOS 10.13

    FIXED:
     (QNAP) Make TMP folder visible in FileStation.
     (Windows) Transcodes could be restricted to low-power
      efficiency cores on hybrid processor models.

   QA:

    portlint OK (0 fatal errors)
